events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From iconic riffs to astrophysics, is there anything this man can't do?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, was born on this day in 1943.

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, a new channel hit screens and declared 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it, though? We're still here! Happy anniversary, MTV.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A truly defining moment for a generation. Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' dropped 32 years ago this month. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Imagine the vibes!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, we remember the unparalleled legend, Elvis Presley. His music lives on, always.

events.title: Tupac Shakur's passing 30 years ago
events.blurb: Rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and passed away on September 13, 1996, marking 30 years since his death.

angles.name: Legacy of Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years on, the impact of Tupac Shakur's music and powerful lyrics continues to resonate. His legacy is undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the world lost guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we said goodbye to the phenomenal Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work still sounds as fresh and electrifying today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Walk Across Abbey Road
angles.copy: That iconic album cover... The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' dropped 57 years ago this month, a masterpiece that still sounds incredible.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, was born on this day in 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and attitude continue to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher was born on this day in 1972.

angles.name: Biblical Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid's another year older! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still absolutely biblical.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released
events.blurb: John Lennon's seminal album 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 8, 1971, featuring the timeless title track.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A message as powerful and relevant today as it was then.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before? Apple's first iPod was unveiled 25 years ago this month, changing how we listened to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the 1962 premiere of 'Dr. No', the very first 007 film.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since the world met 007 on the big screen. What's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The visionary co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon. A true icon of peace and music.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese was born on this day in 1939.

angles.name: And Now For Something Completely Different
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty, a comedic genius.
